meta.title: Animesh Pandey · Senior Frontend Engineer | React, TypeScript, Next.js
meta.description: Animesh Pandey is a Senior Frontend Engineer based in Bangalore with 7+ years building scalable SaaS platforms: MMM dashboards, microfrontends for 50k+ daily users, and agentic AI products. Open to senior & staff roles.

hero.sub: Senior Frontend Engineer · React, TypeScript, Next.js
hero.tagline: I ship interfaces that survive real data: marketing intelligence dashboards, microfrontend platforms for 50k+ daily users, and agentic AI products. Based in Bangalore · open to remote-friendly roles.

skills.title: Stack & craft
skills.intro: Production tools from recent platforms - not a buzzword dump.

writing.label: // writing
writing.title: On the craft
writing.intro: I write about the JavaScript patterns, system design decisions, and frontend engineering trade-offs I encounter at work - the stuff that doesn't make it into the docs.
writing.pipelineNote: Essays in progress - topics tied to production work at Tekion and Lifesight.
writing.pipelineFooter: Want early access? Say hi - happy to share drafts with engineers evaluating similar problems.

about.p1: I'm a Senior Frontend Engineer based in Bangalore, India, with 7+ years of experience building scalable SaaS platforms across analytics, automotive retail, and geospatial domains.
about.p2: At Lifesight, I lead frontend development for a unified marketing intelligence platform, building the dashboards and AI-powered interfaces that help enterprise brands make smarter decisions. Before that, I spent 4+ years at Tekion scaling frontend systems used by 50,000+ daily users.
about.p3: I believe great frontend engineering lives at the intersection of technical rigour and product empathy. I care about the milliseconds, the accessibility, the test coverage, not just the code that ships.

lifesight.desc: Leading frontend development for Lifesight's Unified Measurement OS, a marketing intelligence SaaS combining MMM, incrementality testing, and causal attribution. Building SSR analytics dashboards, contributing to Mia (their agentic AI product), and establishing platform-wide testing and performance standards.

tekion.desc: Owned 10+ mission-critical frontend modules across enterprise automotive retail. Built Storybook-documented component libraries and microfrontend architectures with Webpack Module Federation. Reduced load times by 30% for 50k+ daily users.

vassar.desc: Led frontend development of Kerala-WRIS dashboards. Built geospatial visualisation systems and reduced API overhead by 30%.

tekionAssociate.desc: Developed enterprise automotive retail applications. Built 20+ reusable UI components documented in Storybook.

contact.intro: Open to full-time roles, contract work, and interesting conversations. If you're building something ambitious in the frontend or product engineering space, I'd love to hear about it.

microfrontend.desc: Architected and shipped a production microfrontend system using Webpack Module Federation across 10+ mission-critical enterprise automotive retail modules.
microfrontend.metric: 50k+ daily users · 30% faster loads · 10+ independent teams

wris.title: Kerala-WRIS Water Intelligence Platform
wris.desc: Led frontend development for the Government of Kerala's statewide water resource information system.
wris.metric: 30% API reduction · millions of residents served

mia.title: Mia: Agentic AI Analytics Interface
mia.desc: Built the frontend for Lifesight's agentic AI assistant with streaming conversational UI and tool-call panels.
mia.metric: Agentic AI · Streaming UI · Tool-call visualisation

items.aHtml: Yes, currently open to full-time senior or staff frontend engineering roles and consulting engagements. Based in Bangalore, open to remote globally. Reach me at animeshpandey1909@gmail.com or LinkedIn.

items.q: What technologies does Animesh specialise in?
items.aHtml: React, TypeScript, Next.js, Webpack Module Federation (microfrontends), design systems, SSR, performance optimisation, accessibility (WCAG 2.1), Playwright/Jest testing, and CI/CD with GitHub Actions.
Senior Software Engineer at Lifesight, a marketing intelligence SaaS in Bangalore, where he leads frontend for the Unified Measurement OS platform.
